narrative:
Van Buren Township has 1,581 registered voters, with 53.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 40.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 6.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 33.6 percentage points.
